description_long: This object is a classic wooden chessboard with a square playing surface divided into an 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark brown squares. The board is bordered by a slightly raised, multi-layered wooden frame, which features engraved alphanumeric coordinates (A-H and 1-8) along its edges for easy reference during play. The surface finish appears matte, with a subtle wood grain texture visible on both the squares and the border. The board is relatively thin and flat, with a solid, sturdy appearance typical of high-quality wooden chessboards. The corners are sharp and the edges are cleanly defined, giving the board a refined and professional look. No chess pieces or additional decorative elements are present on the playing surface.
description: A classic wooden chessboard with an 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark brown squares, bordered by a layered wooden frame with engraved coordinates. The board has a matte finish and a sturdy, refined appearance.
description_view_0: The chessboard is seen from the front, showing the engraved coordinates A-H and 1-8 clearly along the border, with the layered wooden frame visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the board from the opposite side, with the engraved coordinates still visible but reversed, and the layered frame prominent.
description_view_2: The board is viewed from the left side, displaying the H-A and 1-8 coordinates along the border, with the layered frame and grid pattern visible.
description_view_3: The right side of the board is shown, with the coordinates and layered border visible, mirroring the left side's features.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular 8x8 grid of perfectly square tiles, alternating between light and dark brown shades. Each square is uniform in size, and the grid is framed by a border with engraved alphanumeric coordinates for reference. The pattern is classic and symmetrical, with no additional decorative elements inside the grid.
attribute_border_design: The border is a multi-layered wooden frame, slightly raised above the playing surface, with a matte finish and visible wood grain. It features engraved alphanumeric coordinates (A-H and 1-8) in a light color for easy reference, and the width of the border is consistent on all sides, providing a clean and professional appearance.
